title: God Of Roadkill
description: A New Unique Horror Mod That aims at adding a Faithful Recreation of the well known Trevor Henderson Creature "God Of Roadkill" into Minecraft!
body:
From The Creators Of The Slumbering Omen (Rupter) and Horror Minecraft Youtuber (Ezure) Comes A Brand New Unique Horror Mod (Not Dweller Copy) Called "God Of RoadKill" 
 
**This Mod Is a Faithful Recreation inspired off of Trevor Henderson's God Of Roadkill, This mod aims at making a Almost Lore Accurate Creature From Its Size, To Its Behaviour and its Appearance, This Mod Also Makes The Creature Perform Unique Attacks And AI No Other Horror Mod Has Done Yet!**

This creature uses a rage system tied to the players actions against wildlife. The higher the rage the more hostile roadkill will become, he will be peaceful during the beginning of the world when the player has not harmed an animal.

Any soul brave enough to face and somehow defeat roadkill once it has been enraged will be rewarded with materials to craft a unique weapon.
